title: Implement pack registry with freeze semantics
description: Create internal/packs/registry.go with Registry, NewRegistry, Register, Get, All, Keywords, PacksForKeyword, PacksByID, HasPack, freeze, DefaultRegistry. Freeze-on-first-read, deep copy on register, keyword deduplication, reverse keyword index. Include minimal core.git test pack. Unit tests for register, duplicate panic, freeze panic, keyword aggregation.
